about.title: About Isnad Company
about.subtitle:
Isnad... The Foundation
of Success and Excellence
about.lunch: Isnad for Real Estate Investment and Marketing, affiliated with MIM Holding Group, was launched in 2017.
about.paragraph:
To be the reference in the real estate consulting sector, in addition to the exceptional and comprehensive skills of a work team that transfers work to distinguished spaces.

Isnad for Real Estate Investment and Marketing seeks, through its vision, management, and work team, to build a strong and transparent relationship between it and investment opportunities, based on a comprehensive vision of real estate, its features, and what it will offer to the client.

hero.title: About Isnad Real Estate
hero.in_isnad: At Isnad, we don't just sell property, we build an integrated investment vision.
hero.subtitle: About Isnad
hero.paragraph: Isnad is an Iraqi real estate marketing and consulting company, specializing in providing reliable housing and investment solutions within Iraq. Isnad works to connect clients with suitable real estate projects through clear content, studied offers, and flexible payment plans, with a firm commitment to credibility and building long-term partnerships based on trust and sustainability.

vision.title: Vision
vision.desc: To become the primary support for individuals and investors in their real estate journey, by providing integrated solutions and multiple options inside and outside Iraq, to create a safe and comfortable experience for them that fulfills their dreams with confidence.

our_values.title: Mission
our_values.desc:
At Isnad... we accompany our clients from the moment of choosing the property until after delivery. We provide them with various residential and investment options, turnkey services, asset management, and a wide network of partnerships that ensures the highest value and service.

We are the real support that turns real estate into an opportunity, and a house into a life.

isnad_distinguishes.title: Why Isnad?
isnad_distinguishes.desc: Because the decision of housing or real estate investment needs a trusted partner, Isnad is your support in every step. We provide integrated real estate solutions that put your comfort and trust first, accompanying you from the moment of selection to handover, with expertise, clarity, and flexible options that suit your needs.

trusted_partner.title: Your Trusted Partner
trusted_partner.desc: Grants you the comfort of decision and confidence of choice, so you can enjoy a safe and comfortable residential experience.

suitable_home.title: A Home That Suits You
suitable_home.desc: Multiple options for housing and investment inside and outside Iraq, to find the most suitable property for your needs.

property_control.title: Full Control of Your Properties
property_control.desc: Invest, rent, or resell your unit easily, with the help of our expert team, and make your residential decision with confidence and security.

ready_style.title: Ready in Your Style
ready_style.desc: Design your apartment or home with furnishing and decor services that suit you, to receive your unit ready and in the style you want.

financial_solutions.title: Flexible Financial Solutions
financial_solutions.desc: In cooperation with elite banks, we provide real estate loans and flexible payment plans that make owning your residential unit easier.

support_every_step.title: Your Support in Every Step
support_every_step.desc: Partnerships and services with more than 30 brands, with exclusive discounts for Isnad clients.

services.title:
Comprehensive Investment Services Placing in Your Hands
Clear Vision and Reliable Real Estate Opportunities

marketing.title: Real Estate Marketing
marketing.desc: Integrated marketing solutions including content, research, ads, and digital marketing.

partners_section.desc: A team of experts leads Isnad Real Estate projects with a strategic vision and field experience in developing cities and residential complexes.
